title: EndpointType missing Display impl that BodyType has
description: BodyType implements Display (lines 581-585) delegating to as_str(). EndpointType has as_uri() but no Display impl. Any caller formatting an EndpointType in an error message or log line must call .as_uri() explicitly instead of using {} in a format string. The two enums are structurally parallel (same manual serde, same canonical-string method, same use in Endpoint and MessageAction structs), so the missing Display is an oversight. Suggested rewrite: add impl std::fmt::Display for EndpointType delegating to self.as_uri() (or self.as_str() after the rename in the companion issue).
close_reason: Valid polish; deferred. Tracked in follow-up bead jmap-chat-tui-yw6v or standalone.
